subject: Add Kafka Producer and Consumer into dmi-plugin
commit_message:
Add Kafka Producer and Consumer into dmi-plugin

- add unit test for producer and consumer logic
- add unit test for missed instructions

Issue-ID: CPS-1505
Change-Id: I932568b47431d437bd212e15934b40d4f13b1c5b
Signed-off-by: halil.cakal <halil.cakal@est.tech>
